name: pitchmaster
description: PitchMaster v2 monorepo root (npm workspaces: backend + web).

scripts.build: npm run build -w pitchmaster-backend && npm run build -w pitchmaster-web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w pitchmaster-backend && npm run typecheck -w pitchmaster-web
scripts.test: npm run test -w pitchmaster-backend && npm run test -w pitchmaster-web
